recommendations.title: CHiPs
recommendations.overview: The adventures of two California Highway Patrol motorcycle officers as they make their rounds on the freeways of Los Angeles.

recommendations.title: Rain Man

recommendations.title: The Judge
recommendations.overview: A successful lawyer returns to his hometown for his mother's funeral only to discover that his estranged father, the town's judge, is suspected of murder.

recommendations.title: A Star Is Born
recommendations.overview: Seasoned musician Jackson Maine discovers — and falls in love with — struggling artist Ally. She has just about given up on her dream to make it big as a singer — until Jack coaxes her into the spotlight. But even as Ally's career takes off, the pers

recommendations.title: The Italian Job
recommendations.overview: Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime. The one thing that he didn't plan on was being double-crossed. Along with a drop-dead gorgeous safecracker, Croker and his team take off to re-steal the loot and end up in a pulse-pounding, pedal-to-

recommendations.title: Let's Go to Prison
recommendations.overview: When a career criminal's plan for revenge is thwarted by unlikely circumstances, he puts his intended victim's son in his place by putting him in prison...and then joining him.

recommendations.title: In a Heartbeat
recommendations.overview: A closeted boy runs the risk of being outed by his own heart after it pops out of his chest to chase down the boy of his dreams.

recommendations.title: Overhaul
recommendations.overview: When truck racer Roger loses everything, he receives a tempting but dangerous offer: to work as the getaway driver for a gang of thieves.

recommendations.title: Charlie Bartlett

recommendations.title: Employee of the Month
recommendations.overview: When he hears that the new female employee digs ambitious men who are the store employee of the month, a slacker gets his act together but finds himself in competition with his rival, an ambitious co-worker.
